titleStmt.title: SII 41.210: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 210. (A.R. No. 428 of 1905.) Puduppāḍi, Walaja Taluk, North Arcot District. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Bhāradvājeśvara temple at Puduppāḍi.

summary.p: Built in at the end. Sale of land by the ūr of Puduppāḍi in a tirukkāmakoṭṭa-puṟam Perumbānappāḍi to the temple of Tirukkuraṅkūṭṭiśvaramuḍaiya-Mahādēvar. The land sold was situated on the bank of the Pālār and had become unfit for cultivation in consequence of a flood in the river, which led to the fields getting sited up with sand. The land was made tax-free by the ūr on receiving the tax money.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷEr malarntu veṇkuṭai mānilam maṉṉuyir toṟum Iṉṉaruḷ curantu niḻaṉparappi nikka muṟaimaiyil ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cellat taṅkaḷ kulamutaṟparuti malarner muṉivaṟku nertiṟai ca kkulāva naṟṟavar tirumalaṟ celviyu mirunilap pāvaiyum kirttiyuṅ kiḷḷaiyum porttaṉip pūvaiyu matuvaiyiṟ puṇarntu potumai tirttat taṉṉurimait teviyarā
pukaḻmaṉuvoṭum vaḷartta kopparakecarivanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī Atirājentra devaṟkku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭi karaivaḻit tirukkāmakkoṭṭappuṟam putuppāṭi Ūrom Eṅkaḷūr Āṟṟaṅkaraik kaḻaniyil pālāṟu puṟaveḷḷampaṟṟi maṇal paṭutiṭalāypayir ceyyalākāmaiyil Iṟaiviḻuntu Ūr viṭuviṭṭu Ūr potuvāykkiṭan=ta
kellai teṅkantoṭṭattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āṟṟukku teṟkkum ṉāṟpāṟkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam patinaṟucāṇkolāl devaṟku nāṭttiruvamutu Onṟiṉukku Arici Irunāḻiyāl nel Añāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭum neyamutum tayiramutum Aṭaikkāyamutum Ākanel munāḻiyum Āka nel kuṟuṇiyāl kuḻi nāṉūṟṟu Añpatum
tu Ūrperāl Aṟicilpperuñceṟu Eṉṟu Ūrom Ivūrt tirukkuraṅkūṭṭiśvaramuṭai mahādevar Ātidāsacaṇṭeśvaran pakkal Innilattukku vilaidravyamum Iṟai dravyamumaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom putuppāṭi Ūrom Innilam kelli tirutti viḷaiñilamāyp payir ceyta tirukkāmak koṭṭattu pirāṭṭiyār pañcavarākkaṭamai mutalāka tiru
vum sammatittu Ūr vilaiyāka kuṭuttom Ātidāsacaṇṭeśvaran pakkal vilaip ṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ūrom Ippaṭi Anṟi Innilam Iṟakkuvāṉ kaṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭai naṭuvuc ceytār paṭṭatu paṭuvār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattukku Ahitam paṇ
Digital edition of SII 41.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
